metadata.description: Query the Breachsense breach-data platform from Claude — stealer logs, sessions, dark web, NHI, ASM, and more.

plugins.name: breachsense
plugins.description: Query all 10 Breachsense API endpoints in natural language. Covers stealer logs, combo lists, third-party creds, session tokens, non-human identities, dark-web leaks, dark-web markets, leaked documents, attack surface management, and watchlist/webhook account management.
